title: jurinea breviscapa
intro: Jurinea breviscapa, also known as the Chinese thorowax or breviscapine, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-coagulant, and anti-oxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea breviscapa include its ability to improve blood circulation, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Jurinea breviscapa can be prepared as a herbal supplement or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
